title: Editas Medicine (EDIT) Q4 Earnings Summary and Performance
text: Editas reported Q4 loss of $0.23 per share, beating expectations of a $0.52 loss by 55.77%. This represents significant improvement from prior year loss of $0.88 per share. The company generated $60.05 million in quarterly revenue, substantially exceeding consensus estimates by 347.63%, marking dramatic increase from $6.54 million in year-ago period. The genome editing company surpassed consensus earnings estimates four times over the last four quarters. The company topped revenue expectations three times in past four quarters. Editas shares declined approximately 12.5% year-to-date, trailing S&P 500's 6.5% gain. Despite underperformance, stock carries Zacks Rank 2 (Buy) rating with favorable estimate revision trends heading forward.
